phone.title: Login ya sign up
phone.subtitle: Apna mobile number daalein. Verify karne ke liye hum 6-digit OTP bhejenge.
phone.label: Phone number
phone.terms: Aage badhkar aap EaseCab ki<break></break><terms>Terms</terms> & <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> se agree karte hain

perms.title: Kuch permissions allow karein
perms.subtitle: Duty alerts bhejne aur feed live rakhne ke liye EaseCab ko inki zaroorat hai. Inhe baad mein Profile mein change kar sakte hain.

location.title: Location
location.desc: Aapke paas ki live duties dikhati hai aur pickup city auto-fill karti hai.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Match hoti duty aate hi ping — app band hone par bhi.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.desc: Phonebook ke drivers ke saath duty share karne deti hai.

background.title: Background activity
background.desc: Battery kharch kiye bina alerts reliable rakhti hai.

done.title: Sab ready hai!
done.trial: EaseCab mein welcome. Aapka 7-day free trial shuru ho gaya hai — har duty tak access. Post karne ke liye baad mein apni identity verify karein.

errors.rateLimited: Bahut zyada attempts. Ek ghante baad try karein.
errors.invalidOtp: Code galat hai. Dobara try karein.
errors.codeExpired: Code expire ho gaya. Naya code maangein.
errors.generic: Kuch galat hua. Dobara try karein.
